title: S&P 500 Hits All-Time High as Fed Signals Rate Cut in September
description: The S&P 500 surged to a record close after the Federal Reserve signaled a potential interest rate cut at its September meeting, boosting investor confidence across global markets.

title: European Markets Rally on ECB Stimulus Hopes
description: European stocks closed higher with the STOXX 600 gaining 1.8% as traders priced in potential European Central Bank stimulus measures to support the Eurozone economy.

title: ASX 200 Hits 6-Week High on Mining and Energy Rally
description: Australia's S&P/ASX 200 reached a six-week high as mining and energy stocks surged on rising commodity prices, with BHP and Rio Tinto leading gains.
